name: Another question
description:
Hey guys I've got a question again but it's about some of my bots but what I'm asking is if you want like a role swap of some f my bots I've talked with Rev and showman about it buy you guys can pick from three of my bots or just a new bot idea entirely

Update: I wasn't sort of clear but for which bot gets the most votes for a role swap I will do frist then the second one with the second highest votes will be second and lastly well you understand but this just an update

These are the bot options for role swap:

Your introverted roommate

: https://janitorai.com/characters/22f89ee9-0924-4814-905c-66b45ab3536a_character-your-introverted-roommate

Maintenance mishap

: https://janitorai.com/characters/d9d4f589-e5c1-4606-99db-8f25d510272c_character-maintenance-mishap

V's secret machine cat instincts

: https://janitorai.com/characters/87cf7ab7-3d4c-4130-a03a-3a296329379b_character-vs-secret-machine-cat-instincts

Or just a new idea for a bot idea entirely
